title: Trump threatens Iran civilian structures
shortDescription: Iran attacked a fully loaded Kuwaiti crude oil tanker off the coast of Dubai, despite the president’s threats.

title: Eric Trump unveils presidential library renderings
shortDescription: Eric Trump shares first renderings of his father's presidential library and museum planned for downtown Miami along Biscayne Boulevard.

title: How Trump's attempt to limit birthright citizenship could affect millions
shortDescription: Here's how President Trump's attempt to sharply limit birthright citizenship could affect millions of Americans.

title: Trump reveals renderings of towering presidential library in Miami
shortDescription: Eric Trump posted a video showing the renderings of his father's presidential library and museum, calling it a "lasting testament to an amazing man."

title: Gov. DeSantis signs bill to rename Florida airport after Trump
shortDescription: The decision to rename the airport follows Florida's approval of a plan to donate a Miami property for the site of Trump's presidential library.

title: Swalwell accuses Trump's FBI of trying to interfere with CA election
shortDescription: The accusation stems from reports that FBI Director Kash Patel is pushing to release an old investigation into the Democratic gubernatorial candidate.

title: White House sticks by estimate for ending Iran war
shortDescription: President Donald Trump initially laid out a 4 to 6 week timetable for the war in Iran. Thirty days in, the White House is sticking with that estimate.

title: What to know about birthright citizenship and the 14th Amendment
shortDescription: The Supreme Court will hear arguments over whether children of parents who are in the country illegally or temporarily are not entitled to citizenship.

title: White House urges Congress to return to Washington to end DHS shutdown
shortDescription: Just as an end to the nearly seven-week-long shutdown of the Department of Homeland Security appeared, it quickly vanished. Then lawmakers left DC.

title: ¿Trump permite petróleo ruso a Cuba? Buque llega en crisis
shortDescription: Trump dice no tener problema con petróleo ruso a Cuba mientras un buque con 100.000 toneladas llega en plena crisis energética.

title: Here are the key elections coming up in April
shortDescription: Here's a look at springtime elections around the U.S., including special elections in Georgia and New Jersey.

title: Trump shows new White House ballroom renderings
shortDescription: President Donald Trump told reporters the military sought the White House ballroom as a "shed" for a secret complex beneath it.

title: Trump allows Russian oil tanker to Cuba
shortDescription: President Donald Trump confirmed reports that the Coast Guard is allowing a sanctioned Russian tanker full of crude oil to reach Cuba.

title: Trump hints at taking Iran oil hub Kharg Island
shortDescription: President Donald Trump suggested to the Financial Times the U.S. could seize Iran oil hub Kharg Island as talks with Tehran continue.

title: Trump says military sought White House ballroom as 'shed' for complex
shortDescription: Trump said the military sought the White House ballroom as a 'shed' for a secret complex beneath it.

title: Trump threatens to bomb Iran's power, water facilities if talks fail
shortDescription: President Trump issued new threats against civilian infrastructure as Washington and Tehran send conflicting messages about talks to end the war.

title: The fight to save New Deal art as Trump moves to sell historic building
shortDescription: Advocates are fighting to save New Deal-era murals in a historic Washington, DC building from being sold or destroyed.
